mapper.select:
SELECT id, standard_code AS standardCode, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, item_name AS itemName, risk_factor AS riskFactor, safety_measure AS safetyMeasure, work_category AS workCategory, work_content AS workContent, acceptance_level AS acceptanceLevel, maintenance_category AS maintenanceCategory, profession, cycle_value AS cycleValue, cycle_unit AS cycleUnit, last_completion_date AS lastCompletionDate, next_schedule_date AS nextScheduleDate, maintainer_id AS maintainerId, maintainer_name AS maintainerName, maintainer_username AS maintainerUsername, maintenance_start_time AS maintenanceStartTime, maintenance_end_time AS maintenanceEndTime, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM maintenance_standard WHERE id = #{id}
AND maintainer_id = #{maintainerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maintenance_standard ( standard_code, part_code, part_name, item_name, risk_factor, safety_measure, work_category, work_content, acceptance_level, maintenance_category, profession, cycle_value, cycle_unit, last_completion_date, next_schedule_date, maintainer_id, maintainer_name, maintainer_username, maintenance_start_time, maintenance_end_time, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{standardCode}, #{partCode}, #{partName}, #{itemName}, #{riskFactor}, #{safetyMeasure}, #{workCategory}, #{workContent}, #{acceptanceLevel}, #{maintenanceCategory}, #{profession}, #{cycleValue}, #{cycleUnit}, #{lastCompletionDate}, #{nextScheduleDate}, #{maintainerId}, #{maintainerName}, #{maintainerUsername}, #{maintenanceStartTime}, #{maintenanceEndTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
